About the Project

THE FREE
SPIRIT OF
BLOCKCHAIN

The pigeon is the world's oldest messenger — surviving wars, empires, and centuries of history. $PIGEON brings that spirit to the blockchain: resilient, free, and community-powered.

Built on Ethereum's ERC-20 standard, PIGEON is more than a meme coin. It's a movement with a mission: redistributing opportunity to those with great ideas but limited resources.

◆ Meme energy. Project-grade vision. Community-driven.

Whitepaper V2

PIGEONCOIN
WHITEPAPER

01
Introduction

PigeonCoin ($PIGEON) is not just another digital asset; it is a decentralized launchpad designed to empower visionaries. In a market saturated with “meme” tokens lacking utility, PigeonCoin stands out by merging community culture with real-world entrepreneurial support. Our mission is to become the “Ruler of the Skies” by funding the next generation of Web3 leaders.

02
The Incubator Hub & Entrepreneur Support Fund

The core of the PigeonCoin ecosystem is our Incubator Hub. We have allocated 20% of the total supply to a dedicated fund used to provide seed capital for innovative projects.

🗳
Decentralized Governance
Funding recipients are chosen through community voting.
♻
Sustainability
Funded projects contribute back to the $PIGEON ecosystem via revenue sharing or token airdrops to holders.
03
Tokenomics

Built on the Ethereum (ERC-20) network, PigeonCoin is designed for stability and long-term growth.

100B
Total Supply
0%
Buy / Sell Tax
1%
Social Contribution
35%
Liquidity Locked

Tax Structure: 0% Buy / 0% Sell — maximizing holder value. Social Contribution: 1% of transaction volume is dedicated to social impact and community growth. Liquidity: 35% of the supply is locked/burned to ensure a safe trading environment.

04
Roadmap: The Ascent

Our journey is mapped from the ground to the stratosphere:

2026 H2
Launch, Liquidity Lock, Community Formation.
2027 H1
Incubator Beta, Startup Applications Open.
2027 H2
First Funded Project, Tier-2 CEX Listings.
2028 H1
Global Brand Recognition, Tier-1 Listings, Full Ecosystem Maturity.
05
Security & Trust

Safety is our priority. $PIGEON features a verified contract address, locked developer tokens (30%), and a transparent governance model. We believe in “Power to the People” through blockchain technology.

✓ Verified Contract
🔒 Developer Tokens Locked
📜 Transparent Governance
🔥 LP Burned
06
Conclusion

PigeonCoin is more than a token; it’s a movement to fund the future. Join us as we take flight.

🦄 Buy $PIGEON
Guide

HOW TO BUY?

01
💳
Get a Wallet
Download MetaMask or Trust Wallet. Connect to Ethereum Mainnet. Back up your seed phrase — never share it with anyone.
02
💰
Get ETH
Buy ETH from Binance, Coinbase, or any exchange. Send it to your MetaMask wallet on Ethereum Mainnet.
03
🔁
Open Uniswap
Go to app.uniswap.org, connect your wallet. Paste the $PIGEON contract address in the search box and select the token.
04
🕊
Swap & HODL
Enter your ETH amount, set slippage to 1–2%, and click Swap. Confirm in MetaMask. Welcome to the flock!

Roadmap

THE FLIGHT
PATH

Phase 1 — Launch
TAKEOFF
